LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D. COUNSEL REPORTS THE SUGGESTION OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE IN DEPT. 206. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES) THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT RULES AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SAYRI CAHUASQUI, LUCILA CAHUASQUI'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS.OF CASE(S) CGC-18-569191 WITH CASE CGC-18-569142. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS SAYRI CUSHCAGUA CAHUASQUI AND LUCILA CAHUASQUI'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS IS GRANTED. (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) CASE NOS. CGC-18-569142 AND CGC-18-569191 ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES; THE LEAD CASE SHALL BE ELI SADDLER V. SAYRI CUSHCAGUA CAHUASQUI, ET AL., NO. CGC-18569142. IN ADDITION, BOTH TRIAL DATES OF 10/7/19 AND 11/12/17 ARE VACATED. COUNSEL TO COORDINATE WITH DEPT. 610 DIRECTLY RE: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE DATE. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT) DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A REVISED PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-569191 WITH CASE CGC-18-569142
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Toal, Esq. 415-438-6625 of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith for Defendants SAYRI CAHUASQUI, LUCILA CAHUASQUIthrough Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Counsel reports the suggestion of the Presiding Judge in Dept. 206. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SAYRI CAHUASQUI, LUCILA CAHUASQUI'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS.OF CASE(S) CGC-18-569191 WITH CASE CGC-18-569142.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendants Sayri Cushcagua Cahuasqui and Lucila Cahuasqui's motion to consolidate actions is granted. All parties have stipulated to consolidation. Case Nos. CGC-18-569142 and CGC-18-569191 are consolidated for all purposes; the lead case shall be Eli Saddler v. Sayri Cushcagua Cahuasqui, et al., No. CGC-18569142.

In addition, both trial dates of 10/7/19 and 11/12/17 are vacated. Counsel to coordinate with Dept. 610 directly re: case management conference date. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Defendant's Counsel to submit a revised proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
